description:
Implement `hx-contextual-help` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Question mark icon button that opens an informational popover with help content.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-contextual-help/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-contextual-help.ts`, `hx-contextual-help.styles.ts`, `hx-contextual-help.stories.ts`, `hx-contextual-help.test.ts`

**Props:** `placement` (default `right`), `heading` (string — popover title), `size` (sm/md — icon button size)

**Slots:** default (help content — text, links, rich HTML)

**Events:** `hx-open`, `hx-close`

**CSS Parts:** `trigger` (the ? icon button), `popover` (the help panel), `heading`

**ARIA:** Trigger is `<button aria-label="Help">` (or localized via `label` prop). Popover is `role="dialog"` with `aria-labelledby` pointing to heading. Keyboard: click/Enter/Space opens, Escape closes, focus returns to trigger on close.

**Composition:** Uses `hx-popover` internally for positioning. Uses `hx-icon-button` for the trigger. This demonstrates component composition patterns.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (open/close, keyboard, focus management), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with form field demo, bundle < 3KB (excluding hx-popover which is a dependency).

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-contextual-help — T3 Help Icon with Popover
